name: skill-manager
description: Auto-discovering Claude Code skill manager. Maintains a searchable registry of every skill under skills/, automatically searches it on each task via a UserPromptSubmit hook and injects the best-matching skill as context, and provides /skill-search, /skill-list, /skill-sync, and /skill-new for managing and scaffolding skills. Structure modeled on AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian; all tooling is pure-Python and cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux).
